message.content:
1. Agentic micropayments enable AI systems to autonomously purchase resources, APIs, or data on behalf of users without requiring manual approval for each small transaction.

2. They reduce friction in machine-to-machine commerce by allowing agents to negotiate and complete transactions in real-time at minimal cost.

3. Micropayments create new monetization models for content creators and service providers who can charge tiny amounts for granular access to their offerings.

4. They enhance AI agent capabilities by giving them economic agency to acquire tools, computing power, or information needed to complete complex tasks.

5. Agentic micropayments support decentralized ecosystems where autonomous agents can participate in markets, incentivizing collaboration and resource sharing at scale.
